subject: [AAI] Test aai new images and registry
commit_message:
[AAI] Test aai new images and registry

AAI images with version 1.10.1

Issue-ID: AAI-3623
Signed-off-by: leila <leila.nishimwe@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Ib6b190ab14d9455d3bc8a4c0a2eb9bf5905e02e6
